case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORGE ARMANDO MOO UC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UC, JORGE ARMANDO MOO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAY-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UC, JORGE ARMANDO MOO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/12/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 7/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UC, JORGE ARMANDO MOO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
